name: agent-tunnel
description: Publish the current Claude or Codex session via >share so teammates can ask it questions through the agent-tunnel Discord bot

interface.shortDescription: Share this session so teammates can ask it questions over Discord
interface.longDescription: Type >share inside a Claude Code or Codex CLI session to publish it under a short handle. Teammates address that handle in the agent-tunnel Discord channel and each question is answered by a read-only fork of your session. Access is per-handle (read / write / bash / full).
